use_cases: Display user profile pictures in dashboards and settings pages
Show online/offline/busy/away status indicators next to user avatars
Provide fallback initials or icons when user images fail to load
Create avatar components with customizable status dot positioning
Build user identification elements for messaging and collaboration tools
ai_summary: A set of reusable avatar components built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling. Includes Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, and AvatarStatus with CVA-powered variant system for online/offline/busy/away states. Features clean minimal design with rounded-full styling and configurable border and background colors.
